reasoning: At 1.1% of portfolio (-45%), the position is a sunk cost. Selling now crystallizes a large loss for no gain — the fundamentals are still decent and a Q1 FY2027 earnings catalyst (~May 2026) could re-rate the stock. The technical downtrend is real but at this weight, the position is too small to sell urgently. Hold and re-evaluate post-Q1 earnings. Exit threshold: below $140 signals fundamental breakdown. ENTRY/EXIT CONDITIONS: Re-evaluate at Q1 FY2027 earnings (~May 2026). Exit if stock below $140.

catalysts.description: earnings catalyst (~May 2026) could re-rate the stock

bullCase: MongoDB's business is not broken. Revenue $695M (+27%), EPS beat, FCF massive beat, 73% gross margins, Atlas cloud +29%. Q4 FCF inflection is real. Analyst consensus 32 Buy, PT $368 (46% upside). Entry at $253 vs avg $460 is 45% cheaper.
bearCase: Guidance cut from 20%+ to 16-18% growth. Two senior GTM executives left simultaneously. Stock in severe downtrend — 29% below 50d MA, 33% below 200d MA. AI displacement fear hitting sentiment. Forward P/E 43x for decelerating growth is not cheap.
